content.full_text:
June 30, 2004

Frank Erridge
Butte County
Citizens for Better Government
3732 Cosby Avenue
Chico, CA 95928

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-04-140

Dear Mr. Erridge:

This letter confirms the receipt of your June 22, 2004, request for advice regarding an unnamed elected official. Under the provisions of California Code of Regulations section 18329(b)(8)(B), unless you identify the official and are writing as his/her authorized representative, the Fair Political Practices Commission can neither address your questions nor provide analysis. The FPPC may also decline to provide written advice, where an inquiry is hypothetical in nature (regulation 18329(b)(8)(D)).

I have enclosed a copy of regulation 18329 for your review. We have also added you to our mailing list for interested persons’ notices.

Should you have any questions, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
